stories.title: World Cup live updates: Neves nets early opener fo...
Sources: Jazz-Kessler stalled despite $140M offer
stories.summary: A gulf remains between restricted free agent center Walker Kessler and the Jazz after Utah put an offer worth roughly $140 million over five years on the table, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Golf bodies set 2030 target date for ball rollback...
stories.summary: The proposed golf ball rollback spearheaded by the United States Golf Association and R&A will now take place as a single-date implementation in January 2030.

stories.title: Cincy coach expecting flood of calls on Sorsby
stories.summary: University of Cincinnati coach Scott Satterfield expects queries on his former quarterback Brendan Sorsby to increase now that Sorsby has applied for the NFL supplemental draft and his college career is over.

stories.title: WNBA schedule expands to 50 games in 2027
stories.summary: Starting in 2027, the WNBA will move to a 50-game season, up from the current 44-game schedule.
